notes.climate change: This is a major driver of oceanographic research.
notes.global warming: Closely related to climate change, but distinct enough to warrant separate inclusion.
notes.remote sensing: Key technology for observing oceanographic phenomena.
notes.sea surface: Important for understanding heat exchange and surface processes.
notes.sea level: Directly impacted by climate change and a key indicator.
notes.data assimilation: Essential for creating comprehensive oceanographic models.
notes.marine ecosystem: Focuses on the biological component of the ocean.
notes.environmental resource management: Covers the application of oceanographic knowledge to management.
notes.geology and paleoclimatology research: Covers the historical and geological aspects of the ocean.
notes.marine and fishery research: Covers the biological and economic aspects of marine resources.
notes.biogeochemical cycle: Covers the chemical and biological cycling of elements in the ocean.
